## Meeting Purpose

[Daily check-in to discuss ProfitD content strategy shifts and address recent company changes.](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [ProfitD pivoting to target smaller accounts and end-users, moving away from data professionals](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Major shift to Prophecy.ai platform upcoming; current approved topics still relevant](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Internal chaos at ProfitD due to CMO departure and Databricks competition](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue with approved topics; new major topics due by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [Shift from targeting data engineers to broader end-user base (marketers, sales, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Current topics (e.g., "data as a team sport") align with new direction](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Maintain focus on non-technical, general audience content](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Ehtisham to develop new major topics by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

### ProfitD Company Changes

  - [Possible CMO departure causing internal turbulence](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Thin marketing team (4-5 people) struggling with workload](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Shifting from Databricks-specific offering due to direct competition](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Potential opportunity for GrowthX to assist with migration to Prophecy.ai](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

### Content Production Updates

  - [Saskia adapting article on "AI agents changing the role of data engineers"](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Continuing work on approved topics; no immediate need for major changes](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Artifact updates (company context, audience personas) on hold until DTM confirmation](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

### Potential New Business Opportunities

  - [GrowthX may offer services for ProfitD's platform migration](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Possibility to leverage thin marketing team for additional support](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Saskia to complete current articles by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Ehtisham to review shared documents and develop new topics by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Hold off on updating artifacts until ProfitD's go-to-market strategy is confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Continue producing content based on approved topics](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Explore potential to offer migration services to ProfitD](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
